case_title: AMGUARD INSURANCE COMPANY VS. JEWISH COMMUNITY CENTER OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUBROGATION/INSURANCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMGUARD INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT JEWISH COMMUNITY CENTER OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-09-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-08-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-16-2015

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 15291010), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMGUARD INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED OCT-12-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JEWISH COMMUNITY CENTER OF SAN FRANCISCO
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-20-2016 CONTINUED TO MAY-18-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-16-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE MAY-18-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100019393)
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100011097) AS TO DEFENDANT JEWISH COMMUNITY CENTER OF SAN FRANCISCO
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-09-2015 CONTINUED TO JAN-20-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-16-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
